DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY STEVEN LITTMAN PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT DERRICK ARMSTRONG PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, DERRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1029 GEARY STREET #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES THRU 10-1-96 IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY. EVICTION STAYED TO 10-1-96 AT 5PM.
